qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} {%? (string(#SOURCE:rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp) %}) %} {% %} %} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <rows nmd-col="1"> <ROW check="1" text="Sarmiento, Domingo Faustino" code="1" value="11423" id="11423" /> <ROW check="1" text="RIZZO, JUAN PABLO" code="2" value="232" id="232" /> qry:define.name: PRUEBA
